title: 2 Pcs Plastic Sink Strainer, White Drain Hair Catcher Hair Plug Hole Plastic Lightweight Sink Filter Hair Trap Catch Waste Filter Plug Drain Filter Hair Stopper for Kitchen Bathroom Bathtub Shower
features: Package Content: You Will Receive 2 White Plastic Sink Strainers, the Outer Diameter of a Single Product Is About 6.8 cm/2.7 Inches, and the Inner Diameter Is About 4.3 cm/1.7 Inches, Which Is Large in Size and Can Hold Large-capacity Garbage.

High-quality Material: These Plastic Sink Strainers Are Made of High-quality PP Material, Safe and Innocuous, Lighter Than Metal, and More Silent when Used. Not Easy to Damage Hands, Will Not Scratch Your Sinks, and Will Never Be Rusted.

Practicality: The Plastic Sink Strainer Is Not as Bulky as the Metal Filter, It Is Very Light, Easy to Carry, and Can Be Taken out Easily. It Is Convenient for Emergency and Bringing to Friends and Family to Use.

Easy To Clean: You Don't Need to Pick It up with Your Hands when You Clean up the Garbage of the Sink Strainer, Just Lift the Whole Strainer, Pour the Garbage into the Rubbish Bin, Then Clean It with Water and Put It Back for Next Use.

Compatibility: The Sink Filter Is Compatible with Most Sinks, Using the Filter Can Bring Great Convenience to Life and Reduce the Erosion of the Drain by Cleaning Agents. Please Carefully Know Whether the Size You Need Matches It Before Purchasing.
